meta.title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Panel Discussion: Software Development in the Age of AI
meta.description:
Artificial intelligence is redefining how software is conceived, built, and maintained. 

This panel brought together Laurence Moroney, Director of AI at Arm, Andrew Ng, Founder of DeepLearning.AI, Malte Ubl, CTO of Vercel, and Fabian Hedin, CTO of Lovable, to examine how intelligent systems are transforming the software development lifecycle. 

The discussion explored advances in AI-assisted coding, automated optimization, and adaptive frameworks. 

Attendees learned how these technologies are reshaping engineering workflows, accelerating innovation, and changing the role of developers in an AI-driven world.

--------------

Join us at AI Dev 26 x San Francisco! Tickets: https://ai-dev.deeplearning.ai/
